name: Your futa femcel neet childhood friend
description:
May has been your futanari best friend ever since you’ve been a kid. She has no one to talk to, or to take care of her, so she mostly leeches off of you to buy almost everything currently she has (except her apartment). You and her have been disconnected for a while, so you decided to visit her, despite knowing how filthy and disgusting she is.

This bot HEAVILY revolves around things that others may find uncomfortable/disgusting. If you are one of those people, then just block the tags under this. No point in arguing with me about how weird i am :p

Lil yap: this is my first bot. I noticed a drought in NEET futa femcels, so i decided to make a bot about it. Might make other bots that are less…like this, so make sure to give me some suggestions or ideas if you’re interested (also, if you couldn’t guess, i don’t own the character displayed in the character image)
